overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving along a desert highway toward the futuristic Night City skyline. The camera follows the winding road past rocky formations and sparse traffic before leaving the asphalt to traverse the desert terrain alongside the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway approach to futuristic city

events.description: dark SUV passes in the opposite direction on the left
tan van overtakes and drives ahead on the highway

agents.ego_description: driving along the desert highway toward the Night City skyline, navigating past other vehicles

notable_agents.action: dark SUV traveling in the opposite direction passes by the camera
tan van driving ahead on the highway in the same direction

entered.detail: large elevated billboard displaying Arasaka corporation advertisement with red and white graphics
futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers and holographic displays visible in the distance
tall reddish-brown rock formation lining the right side of the highway
abandoned burned-out car sitting on the shoulder of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit desert highway with the futuristic Night City skyline dominating the horizon. The camera drives forward past a wrecked vehicle, with the massive Arasaka billboard prominent on the right and red rock cliffs lining the roadside. A dark SUV passes in the opposite direction, followed by a tan van that overtakes and continues ahead on the winding road.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding desert highway with metal guardrails

events.description: dark sedan overtaken on the left side of the road
vehicle begins steering left toward the desert terrain off the highway

agents.ego_description: navigating the curved highway, overtaking slower traffic while following the road's leftward bend

notable_agents.action: dark sedan being overtaken on the left
tan van continuing ahead on the highway

entered.detail: metal safety barrier running along the right edge of the curved highway
tall wooden power pole with transformers and overhead cables
large derelict industrial structure with yellow scaffolding visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the winding highway, passing a dark sedan on the left while metal guardrails line the right side. The Night City skyline gradually shifts to the right as the road curves, with industrial ruins appearing on the left horizon. Utility poles pass by regularly, and the vehicle begins steering left toward the desert terrain as the segment ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert terrain alongside highway with rocky outcrops

events.description: vehicle leaves the paved highway and enters the sandy desert terrain
driving on uneven dirt surface alongside the rocky cliff face

agents.ego_description: driving off-road on the desert terrain, navigating alongside large rock formations while parallel to the highway

notable_agents.action: other vehicles continuing to drive on the paved highway to the right

entered.detail: large reddish rocky cliff face with detailed texture and scattered boulders
sandy and uneven desert ground with sparse scrub vegetation

segments.scene_description: The vehicle leaves the asphalt and drives onto the sandy desert terrain, passing close to a massive red rock formation on the left. The paved highway continues to the right with occasional traffic passing by, while utility poles line the route. The Night City skyline remains visible in the distant background as the camera traverses the rough desert ground alongside the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a sunlit desert highway that eventually deviates from the asphalt into the rugged wilderness. It begins by heading toward the distant Night City skyline, passing a wrecked vehicle and a massive Arasaka billboard while red rock cliffs line the roadside. As the road curves, the camera weaves through traffic, passing a dark sedan and utility poles while the skyline shifts to the right and industrial ruins emerge on the left horizon. The scene then transitions as the vehicle steers away from the metal guardrails and leaves the paved highway behind. Finally, the camera traverses the sandy desert terrain, passing close to a massive red rock formation while the highway and the futuristic city remain visible in the distance.
